===Pokémon Origins===
[[File:Lorelei PO.png|thumb|250px|Lorelei in [[Pokémon Origins]]]]
Lorelei appeared briefly in ''[[PO04|File 4: Charizard]]''. She was seen being challenged and defeated by {{OBP|Red|Origins}}, allowing him to move on and challenge [[Bruno]].
